findings.title: Coffee with a Cop — Wed Apr 22 at Peet's Salvio St
findings.summary: Join Concord Police officers for coffee and conversation with the community. Location: Peet's Coffee, 2072 Salvio Street. Date: Wednesday, April 22, 2026. Time: 8:30 AM to 10:00 AM. Stop by, ask questions, share concerns, or just say hello.

findings.title: Bike Rodeo — Free family event Sat May 2 at New Hope Church
findings.summary: Join the Concord Police Department for a free Bike Rodeo on May 2, 2026, at 11:00 AM at New Hope Church, 2120 Olivera Ct, Concord. Open to kids ages 5 and up. Includes skills course, helmet fitting, free bike repair, raffles, food truck and music. Registration required (does not guarantee a bike).

findings.title: Free POST PELLETB law enforcement test — Feb 21 & May 2, 2026
findings.summary: The Concord Police Department is offering the California POST Entry-Level Law Enforcement Test Battery (PELLETB) free of charge at Concord PD HQ. Additional test dates added for 2026. Check-in 0845, test begins 0930. Registration via Eventbrite. Contact: PDRecruiting@cityofconcord.org or (925) 671-5000.

findings.title: Rec Expo & Job Fair postponed to April 25 due to rain
findings.summary: Due to forecasted rain, the Rec Expo & Job Fair has been postponed. New date: April 25, 1:00–3:30 PM. Free lap swim, rec swim, activity demos, and more.

findings.title: New playground ribbon cutting at Concord Community Park — Mon Apr 27
findings.summary: Ribbon-cutting ceremony for the new playground at Concord Community Park. Monday, April 27, 2026, 1:30–3:00 PM. Location: Concord Community Park, 3501 Cowell Road. All welcome.
